{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alchemical stove
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|An alchemical stove is a clean-burning device used by professional [[alchemists]] and old, rich families.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
